title: Larissa Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Larissa with a Z-Score of +3.17. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Larissa has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is significantly higher than the average, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 10.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 45% and the wind speed is 5.4 km/h, making the heat feel even more intense.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
